data.title: Gamestop, US Steel, Walgreens, Rigetti Computing, Tesla: Why These 5 Stocks Are On Investors' Radars Today
data.description: The stock market experienced a downturn on Monday as the S&P 500 and Nasdaq Composite indices fell from their recent record highs.

data.title: Trump Names Andrew Ferguson As Choice To Replace FTC Chair Lina Khan: Appointee Says He Will 'End Big Tech's Vendetta' Against Free Speech (Updated)
data.description: President-elect Donald Trump has named Federal Trade Commission Commissioner Andrew Ferguson as his choice for FTC chair on Tuesday, Dec. 10, 2024, potentially reshaping the agency's approach to tech regulation and antitrust enforcement.

data.title: Bitcoin, Ethereum, Dogecoin Mirror Stock Declines Ahead Of Crucial Inflation Data Release: Top Analyst Says 'Buy The Dip,' Predicts $275K BTC Target
data.description: Leading cryptocurrencies and stocks slumped for a second straight day on Tuesday as investors awaited the release of a key inflation report.

data.title: Goldman Sachs CEO Says Bank Can Consider Bitcoin, Ethereum Spot Trading If Regulations Allow
data.description: Goldman Sachs Group Inc. (NYSE:GS) CEO David Solomon said on Tuesday that the investment banking giant might explore becoming a spot market maker for leading cryptocurrencies if more regulatory clarity is provided.

data.title: Sam Altman Once Thought Robinhood's Gold Credit Card Was A 'Ridiculous Marketing Stunt,' But Now He Likes It — What Changed The OpenAI CEO's Mind?
data.description: OpenAI CEO Sam Altman praised Robinhood Markets Inc.'s new Gold credit card for its design quality, on Tuesday, Dec. 10, 2024, adding to the growing buzz around the fintech company's latest product offering.
